positive: A minimalist, high-contrast line art depiction of a stylized mountain range silhouette embracing a setting sun. The style is graphic, geometric, and retro-inspired, utilizing thick and thin lines for dramatic effect. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream, suggesting a celestial gradient. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, making it ideal for apparel printing. Emphasis on clean edges, negative space, and elegant symmetry. The mountains should feature sharp, clean peaks and stylized flora elements like abstract cacti. Perfect for screen printing.
